about.title: Coach Dashboard
about.blurb: Pick a team, or two teams, and read the matchup like a coach: who wins and by how much, what kind of game it'll be, where your archetypes hold an edge, who your difference-makers are, and who's available.

matchup_grid.note: Historical head-to-head win rate and average margin by player archetype (archetype A vs archetype B). A win pct > 50% and a positive margin mean archetype A has historically had the edge. Roster archetypes come from the value spine's crosswalk.

upcoming_games.note: Rest-of-season game simulations for scheduled, not-yet-played 2026 games. Margin is from the home team's side; the band is the 10th-90th percentile of simulated outcomes.

availability.note: Current injury / availability, dual-feed reconciled. Absence from this list means no reported issue. Shared with the GM dashboard (same source).

alanna smith.name: Alanna Smith
alanna smith.note: Thursday's game between the New York Liberty and Dallas Wings was postponed due to mechanical issues with the Liberty's flight.

aliyah boston.name: Aliyah Boston
aliyah boston.note: Boston (lower leg) is questionable for Friday's game against the Storm.

aneesah morrow.name: Aneesah Morrow
aneesah morrow.note: Morrow (reconditioning) is doubtful for Friday's game against the Mercury.

brionna jones.name: Brionna Jones
brionna jones.note: Jones (knee) is questionable for Friday's game against the Tempo.

brittney sykes.name: Brittney Sykes
brittney sykes.note: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Sykes (foot) has taken part in individual work at practice recently, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.

caitlin clark.name: Caitlin Clark
caitlin clark.note: Clark is listed as probable for Friday's game against the Storm due to a back injury.

darianna littlepagebuggs.name: Darianna Littlepage-Buggs
darianna littlepagebuggs.note: Littlepage-Buggs (coach's decision) is listed as out for Thursday's game versus Portland.

dijonai carrington.name: DiJonai Carrington
dijonai carrington.note: Carrington (foot) will remain on the inactive list for Sunday's game against the Aces.

dorka juhasz.name: Dorka Juhasz
dorka juhasz.note: Juhasz (knee) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Sparks.

emma cechova.name: Emma Cechova
emma cechova.note: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the...

ezi magbegor.name: Ezi Magbegor
ezi magbegor.note: Magbegor (face) was diagnosed with a facial fracture and will be "reevaluated in the next couple of weeks," Percy Allen of the Seattle Times reports.

iliana rupert.name: Iliana Rupert
iliana rupert.note: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

janiah barker.name: Janiah Barker
janiah barker.note: Barker (leg) will be sidelined for the rest of the 2026 season, Callie Fin of USA Today reports.

jordan harrison.name: Jordan Harrison
jordan harrison.note: Harrison (coach's decision) is out for Thursday's game against the Mystics.

jovana nogic.name: Jovana Nogic
jovana nogic.note: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

kamilla cardoso.name: Kamilla Cardoso
kamilla cardoso.note: Cardoso (knee) is listed as questionable for Friday's game versus the Sparks.

kelsey plum.name: Kelsey Plum
kelsey plum.note: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

kiana williams.name: Kiana Williams
kiana williams.note: Williams is probable for Friday's game against the Sky due to a right hand injury.

kierstan bell.name: Kierstan Bell
kierstan bell.note: Bell has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Fever due to a right leg injury.

kiki rice.name: Kiki Rice
kiki rice.note: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Rice (ankle) has progressed to doing non-contact work at practice but is doubtful to return before the All-Star br...

kyara linskens.name: Kyara Linskens
kyara linskens.note: Linskens (knee) is listed as probable for Friday's game versus the Sun.

leonie fiebich.name: Leonie Fiebich
leonie fiebich.note: Fiebich (foot) currently doesn't have a timetable to return, Jackie Powell of The IX Sports reports.

megan gustafson.name: Megan Gustafson
megan gustafson.note: Gustafson (personal) is out for Thursday's game against Washington.

napheesa collier.name: Napheesa Collier
napheesa collier.note: Collier (ankle) has been cleared to resume practices with the Lynx, the team announced Wednesday.

natasha mack.name: Natasha Mack
natasha mack.note: Mack (foot) is listed as doubtful for Friday's game against Connecticut.

olivia miles.name: Olivia Miles
olivia miles.note: Head coach Cheryl Reeve had no update on Miles' (ankle) status following Wednesday's 96-87 win over the Sparks, per Andrew Dukowitz of ZoneCoverage.com.

rickea jackson.name: Rickea Jackson
rickea jackson.note: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx...

sami whitcomb.name: Sami Whitcomb

sania feagin.name: Sania Feagin
sania feagin.note: Feagin (knee) was diagnosed with a torn left ACL on Thursday and will miss the rest of the 2026 campaign, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.

saniya rivers.name: Saniya Rivers
saniya rivers.note: Rivers (ankle) is listed as probable for Friday's game against Phoenix.

skylar diggins.name: Skylar Diggins
skylar diggins.note: Head coach Tyler Marsh said Tuesday that Diggins (knee) is without a timetable for a return, Alissa Hirsh of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.

taniya latson.name: Ta'Niya Latson
taniya latson.note: Latson (coach's decision) won't play Sunday against the Fever.

taina mair.name: Taina Mair

tehina paopao.name: Te-Hina Paopao
tehina paopao.note: Paopao (leg) is questionable for Friday's game against the Tempo.
